programme.desc: Andrea's fears are confirmed, Vinny is hopeful, and Rhona and Nate fear they will be found out.(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Harriet gives in to temptation, Jamie is stunned and Moira gets a boost.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: An unusual message appears in Chipping Cleghorn's local newspaper, revealing details of a forthcoming murder and, while at first glance it looks like a practical joke, the information proves to be deadly accurate. Miss Marple helps Inspector Craddock with his investigation and the pair soon uncover several likely suspects in the village. Feature-length drama, starring Geraldine McEwan, with Zoe Wanamaker, Elaine Paige, Virginia McKenna, Cherie Lunghi and Frances Barber.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Japp and Poirot investigate the murder of an actress's estranged husband, only to find in the theatrical world, where deception and play-acting are a way of life, nothing is quite what it seems. In time-honoured fashion, it initially looks as though the butler did it - but subsequent inquiries throw up a veritable rogues' gallery of equally likely suspects. Philip Jackson, David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Feature-length mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan as the genteel sleuth. A woman experiences an unsettling vision after moving into the home of her dreams - and it transpires she lived in the house as a child. Miss Marple investigates the history of the property and discovers it was connected with a baffling disappearance years before - which has never been solved. With Dawn French, Russ Abbot, Geraldine Chaplin, Phil Davis and Sarah Parish.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian sleuth goes on an Egyptian cruise on board an old steamer, but when an American heiress is murdered, his little grey cells go into overdrive. On questioning each of his fellow passengers, he realises many of them have secrets they want to remain hidden. David Suchet stars, with James Fox, Judy Parfitt, Emily Blunt, Daisy Donovan, Frances de la Tour and David Soul.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A series of killings in Midsomer St Claire seem to be inspired by macabre images on a medieval fresco recently discovered in the church crypt. As the village prepares for storms and flooding, it appears that someone is using ancient torture methods to punish modern-day 'sinners'. With help from sidekick Charlie Nelson, Barnaby tries to get to the bottom of the case, and unearths a long-held secret that takes him by surprise. With Rebecca Front, Andrea Lowe, Vincent Regan and Roy Hudd.(n)

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Forty-year-old mother of three Samantha Whyte turns to the programme for help as she searches for the Swiss father she has never met, having spent years dreaming about it. Raised by her single mother in Glasgow, Scotland, she was told the story of her parents' whirlwind romance in Zurich, and became desperate to know the man behind the myth. Meanwhile, Vanda James looks to put an end to a secret that has haunted her family for more than 50 years. When she was a child, a new-born baby was taken away at a few days old, and her mother never spoke about it. She discovered the baby was her brother and had been adopted, but her mother died before she had the courage to ask her about him.(n)

programme.title: Britain's Favourite Dogs
programme.desc: A countdown of the nation's 10 favourite breeds, based on a survey of 1,000 dog owners, discovering how the favourites have changed dramatically over the years. The survey also uncovers what makes people fall head over heels for a particular type of dog, with almost a quarter of all households in the UK accommodating one of man's best friends. The programme gets to meet the owners of some of Britain's most outstanding pooches, before revealing which breed emerges as top dog.(n)

programme.title: Deep Water
programme.desc: In the final episode, Roz finally decides to confess to Lisa about what happened between her and Wayne, and together they decide to report it to the police. Meanwhile, Kate is rushed into hospital after Fergus finds her unconscious in the boathouse after a night of heavy drinking. When she is discharged from hospital, she convinces Guy to stay for Fergus' birthday party. Lisa becomes increasingly suspicious of Kate's role in Fergus' health, and Kate and Guy finally come to terms with the damage they have done to their family.(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: A trip to Malta sees Harry called on to investigate the abduction of a woman's pet poodle. Robert Vaughn and Nyree Dawn Porter star.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A man kidnaps a girl on her way home from school and tries to pull off the perfect crime by exploiting a legal loophole and demanding a ransom.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A friend of Quincy's is suspected of arson and murder following an attack on a furniture warehouse, and the trial leads to friction between the coroner and the Federal Grand Jury.(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar is persuaded to shadow a defecting civil servant who has been duped into carrying confidential papers to East Germany. Guest starring Ronald Hines.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle investigate the death of a burglar who was killed after seeing classified information about a foreign country, and resort to theft in a bid to uncover the embassy's sinister secrets. Liz Fraser and Michael Elphick guest star.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A bad dream has Regan's girlfriend fearing for his safety, and her visions ring true when he gets involved in a case involving a stolen lorryload of cigars. The plot thickens when illicit cocaine is retrieved and arms stolen from the US are discovered to be on their way to a military faction in Ireland. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The body of a girl is found at the side of a motorway and Monahan thinks the victim's boyfriend murdered her, but he insists that she committed suicide.(n)

However, the filming is done by the celebrity homeowners' dogs - so-called Snoop Dogs as Kevin McCloud provides commentary on everything from the architecture to their owners' choices in décor and feng shui. This edition features the homes of an adorable five-month-old Cockalier, who's still finding his feet and enjoys pushing the boundaries, and a very handsome, strong and protective four-year-old Shar Pei.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Simon and Jasmine Dale take on the challenging task of building a 21st-century, low-impact three-bedroom family home, starting the build with only £500 in the bank. As part of a pioneering, government-backed, sustainable village called Lammas, the couple must adhere to their fierce planning conditions of self-sufficiency or risk losing everything.(n)

programme.title: Channel 4 News

As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hoards of the alien creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. She travels to the ruins of the ancient city of Knossos, synonymous with English archaeologist Arthur Evans who unearthed much of its palace over 100 years ago, beneath which the legendary King Minos is said to have kept a crazed half-man, half-bull - the Minotaur. programme.title: Legally Blonde (2001)
programme.desc: A seemingly dizzy teenager is heartbroken when her boyfriend dumps her because he thinks she is not intelligent enough to help his political career. Comedy, starring Reese Witherspoon, Luke Wilson, Selma Blair, Matthew Davis and Victor Garber.(n)

programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south-east London, officers Gary and Cona chase a debt of nearly £50,000 in unpaid rent, leading to a feisty confrontation with the debtor. Agents Gary and Paul try to recover over £2,000 owed by a teenager to a local garage in Kent, and officers Max and Paul head to south-west London on the trail of a film producer who owes £8,000 to financial advisers.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Coventry, the sheriffs chase £10,000 owed by a publican to a contractor. The property appears to be empty, but after finding an ingenious method of entry, Matt and Garry are confronted by a surprised and angry landlord. Meanwhile, agents Max and Steve head to central London to try to recover almost £8,000 owed to a firm of accountants.(n)

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Well-to-do teens are taught the true value of money by swapping their first-class globetrotting getaways for micro-budget breaks in the UK. Mel is accustomed to at least three 5-star holidays a year, all paid for by her family. Now she'll be ditching her Louboutins for a pair of wellies on a camping holiday with experienced budgeteers Pam and Graham, their 23-year-old daughter Anne-Marie and three-year-old grandson Jayden from Walsall.(n)

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Braintree's waste enforcement officers crack down on dog owners who are leaving the region in a mess. Plus, Malvern waste warriors Dan and Jude hunt down bags of rotten refuse that have been washed into the local waterways.(n)

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: A retired couple and a single mother from Swindon are the latest to swap homes, lives and budgets to sample life on the other side of the tracks. Shahid and Riffat have worked all their lives planning for their retirement. They have built their own home and live off a comfortable pension. Kelly lives in a three-bedroom council house with her sons. She works as a cleaner and spends no money on herself, with everything going to her sons. How will both parties be affected by the swap?(n)

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in Blackpool
programme.desc: Another selection of people making a living in the Lancashire resort, including husband and wife Colin and Emma, who give horse-drawn carriage rides up and down the promenade. Married couple Graham and Ian reveal the secret to running a successful B&B, having kept theirs afloat for 24 years now, and cabaret managers Dean and Alex offer a behind-the-scenes glimpse of the local drag scene.(n)

programme.title: Celebs Go Bust: Bankrupt & Broke
programme.desc: Countdown show exploring how a celebrity lifestyle led to bankruptcy for a number of famous faces, including Abz from boy band Five, snooker player Willie Thorne, actress Tina Malone and footballer Keith Gillespie. The stars reveal the excessive debts that led to their financial demise, with friends and colleagues also recalling how they squandered their fortunes.(n)

programme.title: Flame of the Barbary Coast (1945)
programme.desc: A cattle rancher falls for a San Francisco saloon-bar singer, but she proves to be in cahoots with a ruthless card sharp who wins all his money. Not to be outdone, he sets out to hone his card-playing skills for a rematch, unaware the city is poised on the brink of disaster. Romantic drama, starring John Wayne, Ann Dvorak and Joseph Schildkraut.(n)

programme.title: Distant Drums (1951)
programme.desc: An army officer mounts a daring raid through the treacherous Florida swamplands. His mission is to take on a group of marauding Seminole rebels, as well as the gun runners who have been supplying them with weapons, and rescue a group of settlers who have been taken hostage by the tribe. Western, starring Gary Cooper, Mari Aldon, Richard Webb, Ray Teal and Arthur Hunnicutt.(n)

programme.title: The Enemy Below (1957)
programme.desc: The captain of an American destroyer in the South Atlantic is still recovering from the sinking of his previous vessel. He tries to outwit a cunning German U-boat commander, but comes to respect the courage of his enemy. However, his crew fears he is not up to the challenge of defeating his opponent. Second World War thriller, starring Robert Mitchum, Curt Jurgens, Theodore Bikel and David Hedison.(n)

programme.title: Alvarez Kelly (1966)
programme.desc: A cynical, mercenary cattle drover sets out to deliver a herd to soldiers at a Union base during the American Civil War. During the journey, he is kidnapped by a Confederate colonel, who hopes to persuade him to help steal the animals and take them deep into rebel territory. Western, starring William Holden, Richard Widmark and Janice Rule.(n)

programme.title: Table 19 (2017)
programme.desc: Dumped by the best man via text, a former maid of honour decides to pitch up at her friend's wedding anyway. Comedy, starring Anna Kendrick, Craig Robinson and Lisa Kudrow.(n)

programme.title: Assassin's Creed (2016)
programme.desc: A convict facing execution is recruited for a secret experiment where his consciousness is sent back in time to experience the life of his ancestor - a 15th-century ancestor battling a secret society. With the same evil organisation plotting world domination in the present, he must master his predecessor's skills and unlock his secret knowledge to defeat them. Action adventure based on the video game series, starring Michael Fassbender, Marion Cotillard, Jeremy Irons and Brendan Gleeson.(n)

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard (2013)
programme.desc: John McClane goes to Russia having received word that his estranged son Jack is in trouble with the law. He is surprised to discover Jack is secretly a CIA agent, and father and son join forces to take on the Russian Mob, who are engaged in a plot to steal nuclear weapons. Action adventure sequel, starring Bruce Willis and Jai Courtney.(n)

programme.title: The Survivalist (2015)
programme.desc: A loner survives the downfall of civilisation, living in a remote cabin on a small plot of land. When two women discover his refuge, he grudgingly allows them food and shelter, but they struggle to trust one another, especially as the supplies begin to run out. Thriller, starring Martin McCann and Mia Goth.(n)

programme.title: The Straight Story (1999)
programme.desc: An old man embarks on a bizarre cross-country journey to visit his estranged brother, hoping to heal the rift between them before it is too late. Though his eyesight leaves much to be desired, he carries on regardless - choosing a motorised lawnmower as his form of transport. David Lynch's drama, starring Richard Farnsworth, Sissy Spacek, Jane Galloway, Everett McGill and Harry Dean Stanton.(n)

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III (1990)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly is transported back to the days of the Wild West, where he strives to save his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown from death at the hands of a villainous gunslinger. Final instalment in the sci-fi comedy trilogy, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Mary Steenburgen and Thomas F Wilson.(n)

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Roland Emmerich and stars Jeff Goldblum, Liam Hemsworth and Charlotte Gainsbourg talk about making the sci-fi sequel.(n)

programme.title: Young Sherlock Holmes (1985)
programme.desc: The teenage detective and his future sidekick Watson meet for the first time at boarding school. The death of Holmes's mentor sets the youngsters on their first case, and they discover that former members of an archaeological survey team have died under suspicious circumstances - pointing to a sinister Egyptian cult using hallucinogenic poisons to kill its victims. Adventure, starring Nicholas Rowe, Alan Cox and Sophie Ward.(n)

programme.title: Independence Day (1996)
programme.desc: A fleet of huge flying saucers launches a devastating and unprovoked attack on Earth. As survivors try to flee the seemingly unstoppable alien invaders, the courageous US president, an ace pilot and a computer genius come up with a plan to take the fight to the enemy and save the human race. Roland Emmerich's sci-fi adventure, starring Will Smith, Bill Pullman, Jeff Goldblum, Mary McDonnell, Randy Quaid, Robert Loggia and Harry Connick Jr.(n)

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Roland Emmerich and stars Jeff Goldblum, Liam Hemsworth and Charlotte Gainsbourg talk about making the sci-fi sequel.(n)

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence (2016)
programme.desc: Two decades have passed since Earth was saved from an extraterrestrial invasion, and in the years since, the aliens' salvaged technology has been used to transform the world. However, it may not be enough to save the human race when a second, even deadlier attack begins. Sci-fi adventure, starring Jeff Goldblum, Liam Hemsworth and Bill Pullman.(n)

programme.title: Insidious: The Last Key (2018)
programme.desc: A parapsychologist returns to her family home to investigate supernatural disturbances. Fourth instalment in the horror saga, starring Lin Shaye, Angus Sampson, Leigh Whannell and Spencer Locke.(n)

programme.title: Magic Magic (2013)
programme.desc: A woman goes to visit her cousin in rural Chile, but as they travel across the country, she develops insomnia. The lack of sleep and the strange surroundings cause her to lose her grip on reality, and she begins to develop feelings of paranoia about her cousin's circle of mysterious friends. Thriller, starring Juno Temple and Michael Cera.(n)

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water (2015)

SpongeBob and his friends embark on a quest to get it back, which leads to them developing superpowers and venturing onto dry land. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny and Antonio Banderas.(n)

programme.title: Carry On Nurse (1959)

Feeling aggrieved by her no-nonsense methods, the chaps decide the time is right to get their own back. Comedy, with Kenneth Williams, Hattie Jacques, Joan Sims, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey, Shirley Eaton and Leslie Phillips.(n)

programme.title: Local Hero (1983)

He gradually takes a shine to the place, while the locals are more interested in the money they can get for parting with it. Bill Forsyth's comedy drama, starring Peter Riegert, Burt Lancaster, Denis Lawson, Peter Capaldi, Jenny Seagrove and Fulton Mackay.(n)

programme.title: Romancing the Stone (1984)

Help is at hand in the form of a craggy daredevil fortune hunter, who has his eye on a share of the profits. Comedy adventure, starring Michael Douglas, Kathleen Turner and Danny DeVito.(n)

programme.title: Home Alone (1990)

The youngster initially enjoys his freedom, but is soon forced to resort to ingenious booby traps to defend the family home from two dim-witted burglars. Comedy, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, John Heard, Catherine O'Hara and John Candy.(n)

programme.title: Dawn of the Planet of the Apes (2014)
programme.desc: A colony of super-intelligent apes thrives following a global virus outbreak that wipes out much of the human race. A survivor tries to make peace with the leader of the apes, but their efforts to reach an understanding are threatened by warmongers on both sides. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Andy Serkis, Jason Clarke and Gary Oldman.(n)

programme.title: American Assassin (2017)
programme.desc: After Mitch Rapp's girlfriend Katrina accepts his wedding proposal during an idyllic European beach holiday, they and many others are gunned down by terrorists. Mitch survives and becomes a master of unarmed combat before the US government consider using him for black ops. Action thriller, starring Dylan O'Brien, Michael Keaton and Sanaa Lathan.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff invites his old college friend Heidi round to show Audrey that she does not have romantic feelings for him, but the plan backfires when she makes a shocking confession. Meanwhile, Adam designs a test to help him choose his best man, and Timmy announces he is leaving Russell's employment.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff tries his best to make Brenda laugh when he discovers she is suffering incontinence in her pregnancy, but his antics cause her waters to break. Meanwhile, Adam annoys Audrey by talking excessively during a spa trip, Timmy struggles to get to grips with the professional manner of his new boss and Russell is frustrated by his new assistant.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted and Robin volunteer at a homeless shelter, but are shocked to find Barney working there. Lily dreads having Thanksgiving dinner with Marshall's parents - and is surprised to discover being tall runs in his family.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney comes to the conclusion that Ted thinks too much and decides there is only one cure - getting him hopelessly drunk. The next day, the gang helps him piece together the hazy incidents of the previous night.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder creates tension when he requests that Lennox post Holly's story on the school blog. Meanwhile, Mel asks Joe to play on her office's softball team when their star player gets injured. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder decides to create a film about the dangers of texting while driving, and asks a reluctant Lennox to star in it. Meanwhile, Mel and Joe get into a dispute with their neighbour (John Ratzenberger) after they confront him about his pet parrot. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Danny is desperate to build bridges with Riley after their recent break-up, but she's still furious after learning that he hooked up with Sam in high school. Determined to prove that she's not overreacting, Riley puts Danny on 'trial' for breaking her heart, with Bonnie acting as Danny's lawyer. Meanwhile, Ben tries to save face with Zoey after discovering that her ex-boyfriend has returned and wants to get back together with her.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben discovers that Tucker has found an unusual way to make some extra cash but when he decides to do the same he rapidly lives to regret it. Riley and Danny continue to argue while attempting to host an engagement party for a friend and it soon becomes clear that their mothers, arch enemies Bonnie and Jennifer, must team up to get the warring couple back together.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is asked to create a message on the off-chance a Nasa mission discovers alien life, and the guys fight over what he should do. Meanwhile, Penny contemplates returning to acting. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Kunal Nayyar.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard questions his engineering abilities when he and Sheldon can't get a toy drone to fly. A cancelled flight almost stops Leonard from giving the commencement address at his former high school, while Raj pits his parents against each other when his father cuts him off financially.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Adam celebrates his 16th birthday, his parents are too distracted by Barry and Lainey's engagement and Erica's band ambitions to acknowledge their youngest son's big day. However, the situation presents an opportunity for Adam to ask Erica to put him on the high school social map. Meanwhile, Beverly thinks she can scare Barry and Lainey straight with the reality of being adults.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's girlfriend Jackie returns after spending the summer in New York and seems like a different person. After receiving some bad advice from his loved ones, Adam takes drastic measures to hold on to his relationship. Beverly is not happy with Lainey's domestic skills and decides to teach her future daughter-in-law a thing or two about family catering.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Amy has to go undercover at a women's prison and befriend one of the inmates in order to try to get information about a criminal operation. Back at the precinct, Holt and the team plan a fake funeral in an attempt to catch a hitman.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: After identifying the mob informant, Holt, Jake and Rosa make plans to infiltrate FBI headquarters to get the man's files, with the captain bringing in his former partner to help out. Guest starring Dennis Haysbert (24's President Palmer).(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy stay up all night as they await a telephone call that could bring big news from the Nobel Committee - is everything in their lives about to change?(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the US sitcom, there's an end and a beginning as the gang travel together into an uncharted future. Howard and Bernadette go away on a trip without their children for the first time, Leonard and Penny try to keep a secret, Sheldon and Amy stick together, and Raj makes a new friend.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox's boyfriend begins to feel neglected when she spends time on her new blog instead of with him. Meanwhile, Joe sets Mel up on a blind date, and in exchange he wants to take out her attractive friend Ariel. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: A friend of Mel decides she wants to have a baby, and believes Joe is the most suitable person to father her child. Meanwhile, Lennox and Haskell disagree over what to do with a rare book when they discover its value. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben is still enthusiastically searching for the mysterious Elle, while Danny and Riley are hunting for a good doctor to help with the pregnancy and Bonnie desperately wants to be involved. Tucker returns from Los Angeles, but refuses to tell anyone what happened when he was there.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker's mother shows up unexpectedly just as he is preparing to attend a prestigious awards ceremony with Bonnie. Riley is concerned that her pregnancy may keep her from being promoted to junior partner at the law firm.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When a famous author receives death threats, Peralta and Jeffords take the case so that Jeffords can meet his lifelong hero. Gina wants to choose the location of the annual Boyle family vacation, and Santiago gets in the middle of a fight between Captain Holt and Kevin.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Holt find the motivation to help Captain CJ with a big case that is proving problematic. Jeffords imposes a green initiative and tells Gina to remove her precious portable heater from the office. Diaz and Boyle take a break from the night shift to visit a foot massage parlour.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly is in her element as she prepares for Barry and Lainey's wedding. Geoff worries about Adam's shortcomings as a wedding videographer, while Barry begins to have second thoughts about the whole thing.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff team up to pull Beverly, Barry and Erica out of their shared misery that Lainey has left town. Adam's dread of gym class is amplified when Coach Mellor's brother, Coach Nick, arrives and uses fear as a motivator. Meanwhile, Coach Mellor prepares for the next stage in his career.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon receive an invitation to present their research to a physics conference, but Sheldon's reluctance to pander to his peers causes conflict between the friends. An intervention by Penny makes matters worse. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Leonard invent excuses to avoid having to attend Penny's performance in a production of the stage musical Rent, but maintaining the pretence makes matters increasingly complicated. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with DJ Qualls.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Another look back at a Hollyoaks love story. A devastated Steph, OB and Tom struggle to come to terms with what's happened, and OB returns to break the news of Max's death.(n)

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The experts match identical twins Michelle and Sharon. Michelle, a party girl at heart who is sick of the single scene, is paired with Jesse, a self-confessed flirt who works in the family business. Sharon is matched with carpenter Nick, a country boy at heart who believes he has been making the wrong choices with girls.(n)

programme.title: The Wolverine (2013)
programme.desc: The former member of the X-Men is lured out of hiding and travels to Japan, where a dying businessman offers him the chance to give up his immortality for a normal life. He ends up robbed of his superhuman powers by a mysterious scientist and is forced to protect the tycoon's granddaughter from a secret conspiracy's assassins. Superhero adventure spin-off, starring Hugh Jackman and Tao Okamoto.(n)

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Part one of two. Buffy's 17th birthday approaches, and she is haunted by disturbing dreams of impending doom involving Angel's death. Her fears are borne out as Spike and Drusilla plot to resurrect a powerful, indestructible demon who was sent into the world to destroy humanity. Meanwhile, Ms Calendar is visited by a face from her past, who has a special interest in Angel.(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick brings Morty to a planet containing crystals that show whoever is touching them all the ways they may die, depending on the choices they make in life.(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick is furious to discover that a secret toilet facility in an idyllic dimension that he built for his own exclusive use has been invaded by an alien and he sets out to track down the culprit. Jerry gets involved in the development of a new dating app that causes widespread chaos.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Sports enthusiast David treats his guests to a traditional darts competition, adjudicated by former world champion Alan Warriner-Little, but he is unimpressed when Paula sends back her evening meal. However, it is Chris and Jacqui's feedback that disappoints the hosts the most.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

But she faces an uphill battle when David and Susan go out of their way to find hairs in the bathroom - and to make mattters worse, her Derbyshire breakfast is not a hit with Chris and Jacqui.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

Documentary following life inside the A&E department of St George's in south-west London, focusing on patients, their families and the staff.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Rick also cooks two much-loved local dishes - lavish kofte kebabs with pistachios, and kapuska, a hearty traditional Turkish cuisine stew from the Black Sea region, whose name is derived from the Russian word for cabbage.(n)

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels through Hampshire and Berkshire, as he continues his journey to Wolverhampton. His stop-off points include Stratfield Saye House, the stately home bequeathed by the nation to Arthur Wellesley, 1st Duke of Wellington, in 1817. He then heads to Aldershot Garrison, where he is put through his paces under military instruction. At St Michael's Abbey in Farnborough, Michael visits the tomb of French emperor Napoleon III and his family, before ending in Crowthorne, Berkshire, the home of Broadmoor high-security psychiatric hospital.(n)

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The next part of Michael Portillo's journey from Southampton to Wolverhampton begins in Wokingham, Berkshire, where the former politician finds out how demand from a growing number of rail commuters fuelled the development of the modern printing press. He then learns about a Tudor businessman who manufactured cloth in enormous volumes in Newbury, and ends this leg of his trip in Bradford on Avon, Wiltshire. Here, a local manufacturer describes how his Victorian forebears were the first in Britain to be licensed to vulcanise rubber.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Baddesley Clinton, a moated manor house near Birmingham. Items brought in to be valued include a diamond bracelet once worn by Rita Hayworth, a wooden peg that was removed from a child's eye in the 1870s, a painting by Lord Mountbatten of his family home and a controversial carving of St George that offended a church's parishioners. One visitor brings in a rare wooden pedestal, and is chastised by one of the Roadshow experts for stripping it of the original paintwork.(n)

programme.title: Attenborough's Living Lights
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the world of bioluminescence, the often spectacular natural light produced by creatures including glow-worms, fireflies and plankton, using specially designed cameras, some fitted to a new generation of deep-sea submersibles and robots to record instances in the very deep ocean. The programme shows a millipede glowing on the forest floor in California, the mesmerising flashing light patterns of the synchronous firefly, the spooky glow of a rare dragon fish and luminous earth worms in France.(n)

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

In Tewkesbury, he joins a group re-enacting a battle from the Wars of the Roses, before he reaches his final destination of Wolverhampton, where he hears how Queen Victoria made an emotional visit that signalled the end of her exile from public life after mourning Prince Albert.(n)

programme.desc: Wildlife that inhabit the world's grasslands, areas that are struck by some of the most dramatic seasonal changes seen in the world. programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Footage of wildlife inhabiting underwater kelp forests, including thousands of giant cuttlefish spawning along a restricted area of rocky reef off the south coast of Australia. Males outnumber females 11 to one, which leads to fierce competition. Larger males use brute force to drive off competition, while their smaller rivals use deception by mimicking the appearance of females. The programme also features tiger sharks hunting for green turtles in fields of seagrass and spider crabs trying to avoid predators while they shed their shells.(n)

programme.title: SAS: Rogue Warriors

programme.title: The Churchills
programme.desc: Historian David Starkey profiles two of Britain's greatest wartime leaders. He begins by revealing how Winston Churchill came to write a biography of his ancestor John, who led the nation against Louis XIV of France. Starkey also explores how preparations for the Second World War were affected by the prime minister's knowledge of his 17th-century forebear's achievements.(n)

programme.title: The Churchills
programme.desc: Historian David Starkey explains how writing a biography of his ancestor John, the first Duke of Marlborough, changed the way Winston Churchill was seen by the public and politicians, and so paved the way for his return to power. The first volume, published in 1933, reinforced the perception of him as a man past his time. But it was the second instalment, depicting John Churchill's march to the Danube and victory at Blenheim, which began to mark out Winston as the only leading politician who truly knew war.(n)

programme.desc: A reveller is murdered at the New Orleans Mardi Gras, and suspicion falls on Jessica's cousin Calhoun. Luckily, the amateur sleuth just happens to be paying a visit and sets about finding the real killer. Angela Lansbury stars.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher tries to unravel the mysterious theft of a painting, and also finds herself investigating the death of a friend's daughter. Starring Angela Lansbury, Norman Lloyd and Cliff Gorman.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Part one of two. Jessica sets out to search for a long-lost relative and ends up investigating a murder at a circus in Arkansas. Jackie Cooper, Martin Balsam, Courteney Cox and Greg Evigan guest star, with Angela Lansbury.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jessica risks life and limb to get her beleaguered brother-in-law cleared of murder - and although a confession seems to provide a solution to the crimes at the circus, she remains unconvinced. Guest starring Jackie Cooper, Martin Balsam, Courteney Cox and Greg Evigan.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Ulterior motives prompt a retired policeman to investigate one of the suspects involved in an unsolved case. Whodunit, guest starring Hayley Mills (Wild at Heart).(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Amateur sleuth Jessica is taken hostage by a political spy while helping two European musicians defect to America. Jenny Agutter guest stars alongside Angela Lansbury.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The amateur detective is called on to help her niece, a talented executive at an advertising agency, when she is accused of murdering her boss. Angela Lansbury stars.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica helps a friend whose diving expedition for buried treasure is hindered by a series of sinister incidents - including a suspicious death. Angela Lansbury and Tom Bosley star.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher teams up with her old journalist friend Haskell Drake to unravel the mysterious and sudden death of a ruthless and corrupt newspaper mogul. Angela Lansbury, Harry Guardino and Eugene Roche star.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica puts her Hawaiian holiday on hold to clear private investigator Thomas Magnum of a double murder. Crossover episode with Magnum, PI guest starring Tom Selleck.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An aggressive TV reporter disappears in mysterious circumstances and the focus of the investigation quickly shifts to Jessica's home town. Angela Lansbury stars.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is drawn into an investigation during the opening night of a play bound for Broadway when she discovers an actress has been poisoned.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The Bakers, the stars of America's top reality TV show, are rocked by scandal when 13-year-old daughter Lane is discovered to be three months pregnant. Ultra-conservative parents Pam and Frank resist SVU involvement in a misguided attempt to shield their 10 children - and their lucrative TV empire - from disgrace. However, when Lane accuses one of the show's cameramen of raping her, one who happens to have already had a vasectomy, it becomes clear the Bakers are trying to protect someone. Unable to aid in the inquiry due to her own pregnancy, Rollins decides to make good use of her time away from the beat to binge-watch the Bakers' show in an effort to identify potential suspects. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The hunt for a missing teenage girl takes an emotional toll on Sgt Dodds, and DNA evidence becomes the crucial link the team needs to identify the youngster's abductor. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A high-school sex party sparks a vaccination debate when those involved contract the measles. Meanwhile, Noah suffers another health scare.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Police from Chicago arrive and team up with the squad to track down a suspect they had to release earlier when a crime in their city resembles a decade-old New York City case. Starring Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura and Remington go undercover at a circus to investigate a mysterious accident that occurred several years earlier. Detective drama, starring Pierce Brosnan.(n)

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura and Steele must protect the obnoxious children of an important federal witness.(n)

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip.(n)

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher tries to unravel the mysterious theft of a painting, and also finds herself investigating the death of a friend's daughter. Starring Angela Lansbury, Norman Lloyd and Cliff Gorman.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: A Friend in Deed (1974)
programme.desc: A Californian police commissioner helps a rich, influential friend to conceal his complicity in murdering his own wife - but reckons without detective Columbo's timely intervention and his dogged determination to bring the truth to light. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Richard Kiley and Rosemary Murphy.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Murder with Too Many Notes (2000)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning composer Findlay Crawford relies on his assistant Gabriel to do all the hard work, but the younger musician demands recognition. To protect his reputation, Findlay kills Gabriel with a time-delayed drug to give himself the perfect alibi - but the slovenly sleuth sees through his ruse. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Billy Connolly.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Grand Deceptions (1989)
programme.desc: An army colonel who embezzled money from his superior officer to fund arms sales becomes the target of a blackmail attempt when his crimes are discovered. The crooked officer kills the extortionist and makes it look like an accident, but the crumpled cop is soon on his case. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Foxworth and Janet Elber.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Murder, Smoke and Shadows (1989)
programme.desc: An ambitious Hollywood director is visited by an old friend, who threatens to expose evidence of his involvement in the death of an actor. The film-maker resorts to murder to keep his dark secret safe, only to end up on the receiving end of Columbo's distinctive brand of interrogation. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Fisher Stevens and Molly Hagan.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Suitable for Framing (1971)
programme.desc: A millionaire art collector is thought to have been killed as the result of a random burglary. However, Columbo is convinced the dead man's nephew committed the crime to avoid being written out of the will, and embarks on a mission to ensnare his suspect. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Ross Martin and Don Ameche.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Crucial Game (1972)
programme.desc: The owner of an American football team is found dead in a swimming pool, and his drowning is regarded as an accident. The down-at-heel detective is convinced that foul play was involved and sets out to prove his case - but his chief suspect has a cast-iron alibi that places him miles away from the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Culp.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A famous crime writer who used to date Captain Ross asks him to look into the disappearance of her much younger husband. Goren and Eames trace the man's movements via his car's GPS tracking system and suspect he was the victim of a carjacking. Further inquires lead them to believe he had staged the crime to run off with his lover, who is subsequently reported missing by her parents. Guest starring Brenda Strong (Desperate Housewives) and Eric Roberts (Heroes).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson hopes justice will be served as child abductor Lewis Hodda goes on trial. However, when a plea deal is rejected, Barba must rely on decades-old evidence to make his case, and faces off against former SVU colleague Dr Huang. Crime drama, guest starring Tom Sizemore.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A high-school student succumbs to the flirtations of an attractive female teacher, and begins to plan a clandestine encounter. However, he quickly finds himself in a far more terrifying situation. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The daughter of a man convicted for rape and incest seeks to change the testimony she gave and bring about her father's release - but the judge refuses to reopen the case.(n)

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams investigates the ration-book fraudsters and coupon fiddlers spawned by the restrictions of the Second World War, and looks at the career of gangster Frankie Fraser, for whom the war provided an opportunity to get rich quick.(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Dallas Campbell examines films from the Horizon archive to discover what science can teach people about dogs. programme.title: Elenya (1992)
programme.desc: Aa 12-year-old half-Italian Welsh schoolgirl stumbles across a wounded German airman during the Second World War and secretly cares for him - only for tragedy to strike as the local townsfolk discover what she has been up to. Drama, starring Pascale Delafourge Jones, Klaus Behrendt, Margaret John and Sue Jones Davies.(n)

programme.title: Underworld at War

programme.title: Fox
programme.desc: Drama following the lives of a London gangster and his family. Billy celebrates his birthday. Starring Peter Vaughan, Ray Winstone and Bernard Hill. Originally broadcast in 1980.(n)

programme.title: Erskineville Kings (1999)
programme.desc: A man who fled his home town to escape his abusive father decides to return once he receives word that the old man is dead. However, he faces a bitter reunion with the brother, who stayed behind to care for their father in his last days, and his ex-girlfriend, whom he abandoned with no explanation. Drama, starring Marty Denniss, Hugh Jackman and Joel Edgerton.(n)

programme.title: Sex Ed (2014)
programme.desc: A teacher arrives at a new school, and is appalled to discover his teenage students are receiving no sex education. He takes it upon himself to provide the facts of life, despite objection from the local preacher. However, his plan is complicated by his still being a virgin and falling in love with a pupil's older sister. Comedy, starring Haley Joel Osment and Lorenza Izzo.(n)

programme.title: 3 Steps to Heaven (1995)
programme.desc: A man's body is found in the Thames, and his girlfriend is convinced he was murdered. Adopting a series of disguises, she sets out to find the last three men to see him alive, and discover the truth about what happened - but is unprepared for the secrets she uncovers about the man she thought she knew. Drama, starring Katrin Cartlidge, Frances Barber and James Fleet.(n)

programme.title: Bread (1971)
programme.desc: A group of friends camps out on what turns out to be private property, and gets coerced into redecorating the owner's house in return for being allowed to stay. The squatters plan to stage a music festival without the landowner finding out - and shoot a porn movie to raise the money. Drama, starring Anthony Nigel and Peter Marinker.(n)

programme.desc: Short visual tour exploring and revealing Shadwell and Grove Park for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.(n)

programme.desc: The girls take on the Mixed Tapes on a game show, but their rivals cheat by exploiting their worst fears.(n)

programme.desc: Halvar challenges Sven to a fight, confident his invincible sword will guarantee him victory. However, Vic fears his father may be in over his head.(n)

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The zebras watch shooting stars and McMeer decides he wants to have one of his own.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: British house-hunters Ric and Nita Halstead, who are seeking a dream home in Miami, receive expert advice before buying. Amanda Lamb shows them round an art deco house, a Mediterranean-style villa and a Florida ranch.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb comes to the rescue of Peter Sullivan and Sally Turner, who are searching for an affordable holiday home on the Caribbean island of Barbados. Among the choices are a new apartment for £66,000 and a traditional villa.(n)

programme.title: All At Sea (1970)
programme.desc: A boy travelling on a ship intends to deliver a package to his pen pal in Tangiers, but the parcel goes missing after being falsely identified as contraband. Family drama, starring Gary Smith and Stephen Mallett.(n)

programme.title: Panic (1963)
programme.desc: A jeweller's assistant is pursued by the police and a violent gang as she struggles to recall details of a shop raid in which she witnessed a murder. Drama, starring Janine Gray.(n)

programme.title: The Dark Man (1951)
programme.desc: A detective investigates a series of murders, while the mysterious killer pursues an actress who may be able to identify him. Thriller, starring Edward Underdown and Maxwell Reed.(n)

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest (2002)
programme.desc: Two bachelors using the same pseudonym capture the hearts of a couple of girls during a delightful weekend in the countryside. However, their cunning deception leads to all manner of hilarious confusion as the ladies in question attempt to work out who is who. Adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comedy, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Frances O'Connor, Reese Witherspoon, Judi Dench and Tom Wilkinson.(n)

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between from around Britain. Andrew White walks on a disused railway in the Peak District and alongside the Caledonian Canal.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb helps British couple George and Frances Phipps find a new home on the Costa del Sol for £100,000. Among the properties she suggests are a white house in a Spanish village and a luxury apartment near a marina.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: British couple Dave and Sue Lewington weigh up their options as they trawl Florida's Sun Coast, from Tampa to Sarasota, in search of a home for less than £120,000. Presenter Amanda Lamb offers them expert guidance.(n)

programme.title: The Bionic Vet
programme.desc: A woman with a seven-month-old puppy faces a difficult decision when Noel Fitzpatrick reveals he must perform a risky operation to treat the young dog's bone deformities. Two animals injured in road accidents are rushed into the surgery and a Labrador puts its newly transplanted hip to the test when it is reunited with its owner.(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Brockley, Peckham and Rotherhithe. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.(n)

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: The extraordinary stories of some of the British men and women who fought or lived through the Second World War, now in their nineties or older. The first episode looks at how national unity was tested in the 1920s and 30s with class conflict, soaring unemployment and widespread civil unrest, but despite these upheavals, those growing up in the inter-war years remember much that was positive about life in Britain at the time. When war broke out in 1939, the men and women of this generation were ready to risk their lives for their country, but the evacuation of the British Army from the beaches of Dunkirk was a wake-up call for those expecting a swift victory.(n)

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: The Oxford Street Security Team deals with a disgruntled customer, and a department store's staff work hard to unveil their Christmas lights. Meanwhile, police are called to a squabble at one of Britain's busiest stations, a 'live cooking' experiment goes wrong at a hotel, and a busker looks for their big break.(n)

programme.title: The Repo Man
programme.desc: In recession-hit Britain, many people have turned to finance companies to purchase items over a fixed period of time. This documentary follows the life and work of bailiff Sean James as he confronts debtors across the nation who fail to keep up their repayments.(n)

programme.title: Closing the Ring (2007)
programme.desc: An old woman consumed by grief following the death of her husband receives a message from a stranger who claims to have found a ring belonging to her that was lost decades before. The discovery brings to light secrets from her past and causes her to look back to the beginnings of her marriage. Drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Christopher Plummer and Neve Campbell.(n)

programme.title: True Blue Confessions
programme.desc: A tribute to Mary Millington, Britain's number one sex symbol of the 1970s.(n)

programme.title: Away (2016)
programme.desc: In Blackpool, an unlikely friendship blossoms between a lonely, suicidal widower and a young woman trying to escape an abusive ex-boyfriend. Drama, starring Timothy Spall, Juno Temple and Matt Ryan.(n)

programme.title: Bronco Bullfrog (1970)
programme.desc: A teenage couple craving freedom from their disapproving families fall in with a young criminal fresh out of borstal, who wants their help with a robbery. Drama, starring Del Walker and Anne Gooding.(n)

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: The Oxford Street Security Team deals with a disgruntled customer, and a department store's staff work hard to unveil their Christmas lights. programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely.(n)

programme.title: Anoop and The Elephant (1972)
programme.desc: Two English children meet an Indian boy and his pet elephant, and help to keep the animal out of the hands of a greedy circus owner. Family drama, with Anoop Singh and Phil Daniels.(n)

programme.title: Black Island (1978)
programme.desc: Two boys become separated from the rest of their class while on a trip to a small island - and end up getting captured by a gang of armed criminals. Adventure, starring Michael Elphick, Martin Murphy and Michael Salmon.(n)

programme.title: Brief Encounter (1945)
programme.desc: A suburban housewife meets a married doctor by chance in a railway station waiting room. Later, their paths cross many times until the pair become friends and their meetings a fixed arrangement. But as their feelings for each other transform from friendship into passion, both come to realise the affair is doomed to fail. David Lean's romantic drama, with Celia Johnson, Trevor Howard and Cyril Raymond.(n)

programme.title: Very Important Person (1961)
programme.desc: A pompous Allied scientist ends up in a PoW camp after crash-landing during a reconnaissance mission over Germany. His uncompromising attitude and a series of misunderstandings initially earn him the enmity of his fellow inmates, but his popularity improves when he devises an audacious escape plan. Second World War comedy, with James Robertson Justice, Stanley Baxter, Leslie Phillips and Eric Sykes.(n)

programme.title: A Chorus of Disapproval (1988)
programme.desc: A shy widower gets entangled in romantic intrigue while rehearsing with an amateur theatrical troupe in Scarborough. Comedy based on Alan Ayckbourn's stage play, starring Jeremy Irons, Anthony Hopkins, Prunella Scales, Lionel Jeffries, Jenny Seagrove, Gareth Hunt and Patsy Kensit.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb advises house-hunters Steve Cox and Varinder Dhami who are looking for a holiday home in Lanzarote, showing them round a countryside villa and a £50,000 apartment.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Amanda Lamb helps Michael Grant search for a holiday home in Fuerteventura on the Canary Islands for £60,000. Properties on offer include a bargain flat, a traditional farmhouse and rural accommodation in the desert.(n)

programme.title: Earth Cycle
programme.desc: Simon Parker charts the seasonal cycles of the natural world as he journeys through Scandinavia on a bicycle, wild camping, seeing animal migrations and sampling local food.(n)

programme.title: D-Day: The Shortest Day
programme.desc: Survivors provide a compelling insight into the D-Day landings, discussing the preparations, their actions, and the consequences of an operation which had such a crucial bearing on the outcome of the Second World War.(n)

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent.(n)

programme.title: Chubby Funny (2016)
programme.desc: An aspiring actor continually blames others for his failure to become a big star. He decides to give himself a year living in London to finally land his big break - but the personal crises that have dogged him all his life are not going away. Comedy drama, directed by and starring Harry Michell, with Augustus Prew and Jeff Rawle.(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for the chance to compete for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman.(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings.(n)
